name: Apple Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat the eggs until well combined. Add the matzo meal and salt, mixing thoroughly.
2. Gradually add the sliced apples to the batter.
3. Heat oil in a deep skillet or pot to about 350°F (175°C).
4. Using a spoon, drop portions of the batter into the hot oil.
5. Fry until golden brown on each side.
6. Remove from oil and drain on paper towels.
7. Sprinkle with cinnamon and sugar before serving.
